goal: Prepare MVP verification, documentation, and release readiness for the new extension.
non_goals: Do not publish to Chrome Web Store in this task.
Do not remove the current local-fixed extension.
Do not claim browser compatibility beyond tested browsers.
acceptance_criteria: Build/typecheck commands pass or skipped commands are recorded with reasons.
Manual Chrome unpacked-extension smoke checklist is completed.
README or docs explain how to load the new extension.
Known limitations and high-risk permission notes are documented.
review_findings.json is updated for medium/high risk surfaces.
